body:
## Summary
Migrate Rogue layer-progression meta-state (BATTLE/UPGRADE) from frontend refs to backend GameContext, giving the backend full authority over state transitions and guarding illegal event sequences.

## Changes

### Backend — core state
- pve/actions.ts: Add rogueMode and roguePhase ('BATTLE'|'UPGRADE') to GameContext. In doResolveComplete, when rogueMode=true and boss HP hits 0, set roguePhase='UPGRADE' and keep battleResult='ONGOING' so the room is not archived/destroyed.

### Backend — room lifecycle
- pve/runtime.ts: Add rogueMode to RoomEntry and createRoom opts. Expose isRogueRoom() getter. Fix sendRoomEvent auto-archive: Solo WIN archives immediately; Rogue per-layer WIN stays ONGOING and defers archiving to LOSE or run-complete.

### Backend — socket handlers
- pveHandlers.ts:
  - New startRogueGame handler: creates room with rogueMode=true, restores from checkpoint if one exists, otherwise starts fresh.
  - New upgradePhaseReady handler: validates roguePhase=UPGRADE, generates upgrade options, emits upgradeOptions to client.
  - advanceLayer: guarded — only allowed in rogueMode rooms in UPGRADE phase. Resets roguePhase to 'BATTLE' after advancing.
  - restoreFromCheckpoint: guarded to rogueMode rooms only.
  - confirmPlay: blocked when roguePhase=UPGRADE.
  - startPveGame: explicitly sets rogueMode=false (Solo).

### Backend — checkpoint
- routes/rogue.js: /save endpoint stores roguePhase='BATTLE' in snapshot (auto-save always occurs during BATTLE, never UPGRADE).

### Backend — XState dead code removal
- socket.ts: Remove registerSocketHandlers registration.
- socketHandlers.js: Add LEGACY header comment.
- tests/unit/pve.socketHandlers.test.js: Both tests changed to test.skip with deprecation notice.
- types/state.ts: Mark GamePhase/UpgradePhase/GAME_PHASE/GameState as @deprecated (superseded by GameContext.roguePhase).

### Backend — test fix
- tests/unit/pve.handlers.test.ts: Add missing handshake property to FakeSocket so resolveSocketUserId no longer throws on construction.

### Frontend
- hooks/useGameLogic.js: Add startEvent option (default 'startPveGame').
- hooks/useRogueLikeLogic.js:
  - Pass { startEvent: 'startRogueGame' } to useGameLogic.
  - showEnhancementAfterAnimation: replace REST getUpgradeOptions call with socket emit upgradePhaseReady.
  - Add upgradeOptions socket listener for backend-pushed options.
- pages/LobbyPage.jsx: Remove Profile sidebar NavLink, Profile action card, unused profilePath variable, and SidebarIconUser component.
title: feat(rogue): move meta-state machine to backend + bug
